case_title: ENSLEY, JAY WILLIS VS THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-07-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-18-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 DEFENDANT WILL NOT STIPULATE TO A PRO TEM COMMISSIONER. CASE TO BE HEARD BY COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ENSLEY, JAY WILLIS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-18-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-01-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTD PER STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO 11/1/06 AT 1:30 P.M.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-01-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-22-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 ORDER GRANTED.

PLTFF'S CONTC ORDER REQUEST FILED; EXEMPT; TO FOLDER/TRAY.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING SENT TO PLTF RETURNED UNDELIVERED. ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY ENSLEY, JAY WILLIS AS TO DEFENDANT THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-07-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
